headline: SK Hynix +12% on Micron earnings beat
detail: Micron delivered a blowout quarter, sending the entire memory and semiconductor complex surging. This is directly bullish for AVGO, SMH, and CRWD sentiment — your semis book gets a tailwind today. Use the strength in AVGO and SMH to act on your scanner flags, not to add.

headline: Anthropic expands AI data center buildout
detail: Anthropic aggressively hiring and building data centers signals hyperscaler AI infrastructure spending is accelerating. This is fuel for the chip-demand narrative that underpins AVGO, SMH, and PLTR's AI growth story. Positive backdrop for your sector concentration.

headline: Iran warns ships over Hormuz transit
detail: Iran flagging Hormuz transit as 'unacceptable' is a geopolitical risk that could spike oil and disrupt global supply chains. A Hormuz escalation would create macro uncertainty that typically hits high-multiple tech and chip names — your entire book — through a risk-off rotation. Worth monitoring closely given your margin exposure.

headline: High-volume roster-cut Friday approaching
detail: Friday is expected to be one of the highest-volume days of the year due to institutional rebalancing. Big volume swings can hit extended or already-weak names hard — PLTR and AVGO are both down double digits and flagged, making them vulnerable to accelerated selling if institutions cut exposure.
